title: Fresh Creamy Dutch Tofu Soup
description: A silky one‑pot Dutch‑style soup that blends silken tofu, rich soy milk, and aromatic spices into a fresh, creamy delight.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat and sauté onion, garlic, carrot, and celery until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add turmeric, curry powder, salt, and pepper; stir for 1 minute to toast the spices.
Pour in soy milk and bring to a gentle simmer, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
Gently fold in the silken tofu cubes, then simmer uncovered for 10 minutes, letting the flavors meld.
Turn off the heat and stir in fresh lemon juice for brightness.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed; serve hot with a sprinkle of toasted sesame seeds if desired.
